errors.registration_is_currently_disabled_you_n: Registration is currently disabled. You need a valid invitation to create an account.

signUp.title: Креирај сметка

signUp.passwordDisabledAlert: Креирањето сметка со лозинка е оневозможено. Користи социјална или OIDC метода за најава од страницата за најава.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.subtitle: Choose how Kaneo delivers your account notifications and which channels to use.
notificationsPage.emailDescription: Use your account email as the destination for notifications.
notificationsPage.accountEmailHint: Email delivery always goes to the signed-in account email.
notificationsPage.ntfyDescription: Publish account notifications to an ntfy topic.
notificationsPage.ntfyTokenHintConfigured: A token is already configured ({{masked}}). Enter a new token to replace it.
notificationsPage.ntfyTokenHintOptional: Optional. Provide a token if your ntfy server requires authentication.
notificationsPage.gotifyDescription: Send account notifications to your Gotify server.
notificationsPage.gotifyTokenHintConfigured: An app token is already configured ({{masked}}). Enter a new token to replace it.
notificationsPage.gotifyTokenHintRequired: Required. Use an application token from your Gotify server.
notificationsPage.webhookDescription: Send account notifications to your own endpoint as JSON.
notificationsPage.webhookSecretHintConfigured: A signing secret is already configured ({{masked}}). Enter a new one to replace it.
notificationsPage.webhookSecretHintOptional: Optional. Kaneo signs the request body when a secret is set.
notificationsPage.workspaceRulesDescription: Reuse your global channels, then decide which workspaces and projects are allowed to send account notifications.
notificationsPage.workspaceCardHint: Choose which channels this workspace can use for account notifications.
notificationsPage.emailChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications by email.
notificationsPage.emailChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable email globally first.
notificationsPage.ntfyChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications to ntfy.
notificationsPage.ntfyChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable ntfy globally first.
notificationsPage.gotifyChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications to Gotify.
notificationsPage.gotifyChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable Gotify globally first.
notificationsPage.webhookChannelHintEnabled: Send matching workspace notifications to your webhook.
notificationsPage.webhookChannelHintDisabled: Configure and enable the webhook globally first.
notificationsPage.projectScopeDescription: All projects are included by default. Narrow it down if this workspace should only send notifications from selected projects.
notificationsPage.allProjectsDescription: Deliver notifications from every project in this workspace.
notificationsPage.selectedProjectsDescription: Only deliver notifications from chosen projects.
notificationsPage.noProjectsInWorkspace: No projects available for this workspace yet.
notificationsPage.toastRuleSaveFailed: Failed to save workspace notification rule
notificationsPage.toastRuleRemoveFailed: Failed to remove workspace notification rule
notificationsPage.eventCommentsHint: Includes new comments on tasks assigned to you and direct @mentions.
notificationsPage.eventPreferencesDescription: Choose which task events create in-app notifications and can be delivered to your connected channels.
notificationsPage.reminderLeadTimeHint: Between 1 hour and 30 days before. Overdue notifications are sent separately.
notificationsPage.reminderLeadTimeInvalid: Enter a whole number between 1 and {{max}}.
notificationsPage.reminderLeadTimeLabel: Remind me before the due date

projectIntegrations.title: Интеграции на проект
projectIntegrations.subtitle: Поврзи го твојот проект со надворешни алатки и сервиси за да го подобриш работниот тек.
projectIntegrations.githubSectionSubtitle: Синхронизирај задачи со GitHub issues и овозможи двонасочна синхронизација.
projectIntegrations.giteaSectionSubtitle: Синхронизирај задачи со само-хостирана Gitea инстанца (issues, PRs, webhooks).
